title: panicum nervatum
intro: Panicum nervatum, also known as Switch Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Panicum nervatum include reducing fever, relieving congestion, and soothing sore throats. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although proper preparation and dosage should be consulted with a healthcare professional.
